mission: Build the 50-idea buildable catalog in the isolated sandbox worktree, in 5 locked phases (B0 harnesses -> B1 verifiers -> B2 wiring -> B3 bridges+motors -> B4 dashboards+commercial+CI), starting with TH-1.
raw_move: Simplify, clean, and wire governance subsystems; add validators, bridges, dashboards; enforce regulatory copy claims; populate motors; build commercial deliverables in sandbox.
immediate_goal: Lock a phased build plan via CHESS, then start TH-1 (promotion-gate refusal-teeth pytest harness).
verification_after_execution: each verifier proven by a negative-proof fixture it rejects
